title: Trump's Guy Won Colombia. By Less Than 1%.
script: Trump's pick won Colombia! Abelardo de la Espriella — Colombian lawyer, dual US citizen, never held elected office before — won Colombia's presidential runoff on Sunday by less than 1%. He got 12.9 million votes. His opponent, Iván Cepeda, got 12.6 million. About 250,000 votes between them, out of nearly 26 million cast. De la Espriella ran on an 'iron fist' approach to crime: mega-prisons, crackdowns, close ties to Washington. He was endorsed by President Trump and spoke openly about his connections to US political circles. He takes office August 7. Cepeda has called for a full final count, which in Colombia is a second, thorough review conducted by judges and lawyers. Until it's done, no official winner exists. So — when Trump backs your candidate and he wins by 0.97%, is that a mandate or a coin flip?
